SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.title: Flow
SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.description: Combat momentum. Some cards gain or spend Flow; while you have 3 or more, you are In the Flow.
SPACECOWBOY-FLOW.smartDescription: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} combat momentum. Some cards gain or spend Flow. At [blue]3[/blue] or more, {OnPlayer:you are|they are} [gold]In the Flow[/gold].
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.title: The Weight
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.description: Lose HP at the start of your next turn.
SPACECOWBOY-THE_WEIGHT.smartDescription: At the start of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next turn, {OnPlayer:you lose|they lose} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
